first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. Both versions receive the same score and cite the exact same core reasons for it: the candidate's lack of the required 8 years of C++ experience and the mismatch between their full-stack/web background and the role's focus on low-level compute platforms. The minor differences in wording for strengths and concerns represent typical run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in assessment based on the geographical location of the candidate's experience.
